case_title: SF AMERICAN TAXICAB, INC VS. BRIGIDO PINELA MAGAT et al

CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO GEICO INSURANCE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-07-2011 AT 5:30PM.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GEICO INSURANCE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-07-2011 - JUDGMENT.
